Pre-existing Behaviour: User has never visited the app. No cn_clientId or cn_accounts in localStorage.
Test Steps: 1. Open https://encryptioner.github.io/CloudNest/ 2. Click "Get Started" or any dashboard link
New/Expected Behaviour: User is redirected to /setup page showing the setup wizard at Welcome step. No flash of dashboard content before redirect.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard; Assert: redirected to /CloudNest/setup; Selectors: setup wizard heading visible

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is on the setup wizard at the Enter Client ID step.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /setup 2. Progress to the Client ID entry step 3. Enter invalid text (e.g., "abc123") and click Save 4. Enter valid Client ID ending in .apps.googleusercontent.com and click Save
New/Expected Behaviour: Step 3: Error message shown, Client ID is NOT saved to localStorage. Step 4: Success, Client ID stored under cn_clientId in localStorage.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/setup; Selectors: client ID input, save button; Assert: localStorage.getItem('cn_clientId') matches input; Data: valid='123456789.apps.googleusercontent.com', invalid='not-a-client-id'

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is on the setup wizard Welcome step.
Test Steps: 1. Open /setup 2. Click through each step (Welcome -> Create Project -> Enable API -> Consent Screen -> Create Client ID -> Enter Client ID -> Connect Account -> Done) 3. Verify each step shows relevant instructions 4. Verify Back button works to return to previous steps
New/Expected Behaviour: Each step renders with clear instructions. Back navigation works. Progress indicator updates. Steps mention 100 test user limit on the Consent Screen step.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/setup; Assert: step counter increments; Assert: 'testing mode' or '100 test users' text visible on consent step

Pre-existing Behaviour: User has entered a valid Client ID. On the Connect Account step of the wizard.
Test Steps: 1. Complete setup wizard through Client ID entry 2. Click "Connect Google Account" 3. Complete the Google OAuth popup flow 4. Verify account appears as connected
New/Expected Behaviour: Google OAuth popup opens. After approval, account email is shown as connected. cn_accounts in localStorage contains an entry with email, accessToken, tokenExpiry, and storageQuota. User can proceed to dashboard.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/setup?step=connect; Assert: localStorage cn_accounts array has length > 0 after flow

Pre-existing Behaviour: User has valid cn_clientId and cn_accounts with non-expired token in localStorage.
Test Steps: 1. Manually set valid cn_clientId and cn_accounts in localStorage 2. Navigate to /dashboard
New/Expected Behaviour: Dashboard loads directly without redirect to /setup. Overview page shows connected account data.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard; Assert: no redirect to /setup; Assert: Overview heading visible

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is logged in on the dashboard with at least one connected account.
Test Steps: 1. Click the sign out button in the Navbar (power icon, top right) 2. Verify redirect 3. Check localStorage
New/Expected Behaviour: User is redirected to landing page (/). localStorage no longer contains cn_clientId or cn_accounts. Navigating to /dashboard redirects back to /setup.
Automation Notes: Selectors: sign-out button in navbar; Assert: localStorage.getItem('cn_clientId') === null; Assert: localStorage.getItem('cn_accounts') === null

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is authenticated with at least one connected account that has files.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dashboard 2. Observe the stat cards (Total Files, Storage, Drive Accounts) 3. Check Storage Breakdown section 4. Check File Types section 5. Check Recent Files section
New/Expected Behaviour: Stat cards show correct counts. Storage bar shows used/free space per account. File Types section shows type distribution. Recent Files lists up to 6 files with thumbnails, names, sizes, and dates.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard; Selectors: stat cards, storage breakdown, file types, recent files list

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is authenticated with files and folders in their Drive.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dashboard/files 2. Observe file/folder grid 3. Click a folder to navigate into it 4. Verify breadcrumb trail updates 5. Click breadcrumb to navigate back 6. Toggle between grid and list view
New/Expected Behaviour: Folders show folder icons and are clickable. Clicking a folder loads its children. Breadcrumb shows path (My Drive > FolderName). Grid/list toggle works. Files show appropriate type icons, sizes, and dates.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard/files; Assert: breadcrumb updates on folder click; Assert: grid/list toggle changes layout

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is on /dashboard/files with multiple files visible.
Test Steps: 1. Type a search term in the search box 2. Verify filtered results 3. Clear search 4. Change sort order (Name, Date, Size) 5. Change type filter (Images, Videos, Documents, etc.)
New/Expected Behaviour: Search filters files by name in real-time. Sort changes the order correctly. Type filter shows only matching file types. Empty state message shown when no results match.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard/files; Selectors: search input, sort dropdown, type filter; Assert: file count changes with filters

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is authenticated with at least one connected account that has free storage.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dashboard/files 2. Drag a file (<5MB) onto the upload zone 3. Observe upload progress 4. Verify file appears in the file list after upload completes
New/Expected Behaviour: Upload zone highlights on drag-over. Progress indicator shows during upload. Toast notification shows success on completion. File appears in the list without manual refresh. File is uploaded to the account with most free space.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard/files; Selectors: upload zone drop area; Assert: toast shows success; Assert: new file in list

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is authenticated on /dashboard/files.
Test Steps: 1. Click the upload zone area 2. Select a file from the file picker dialog 3. Observe upload progress and completion
New/Expected Behaviour: File picker dialog opens. After selection, upload begins. Progress shown. Toast confirms success. File appears in list.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard/files; Selectors: upload zone click area, file input

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is on /dashboard/files with at least one owned file.
Test Steps: 1. Find a file in the list 2. Click the rename action (pencil icon or context menu) 3. Enter a new name and confirm 4. Verify the name updates in the UI
New/Expected Behaviour: Rename dialog/inline input appears. After confirming, the file name updates in the list. Toast shows success. Google Drive reflects the new name.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard/files; Assert: file name changes in UI after rename

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is on /dashboard/files with at least one owned file.
Test Steps: 1. Click delete on a file 2. Verify file is moved to trash (not permanently deleted) 3. Navigate to /dashboard/trash 4. Verify the file appears in trash
New/Expected Behaviour: File disappears from the files list. Toast confirms move to trash. Trash page shows the file with restore and permanent delete options.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard/files then /CloudNest/dashboard/trash; Assert: file removed from files list; Assert: file appears in trash

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is on /dashboard/trash with at least one trashed file.
Test Steps: 1. Click Restore on a trashed file 2. Verify it disappears from trash 3. Navigate to /dashboard/files and verify it reappears 4. Trash another file 5. Click Delete permanently 6. Verify it is removed from trash
New/Expected Behaviour: Restore: file removed from trash, toast shows success, file reappears in files list. Permanent delete: file removed from trash, toast shows success, file does NOT reappear in files list.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard/trash; Selectors: restore button, delete button; Assert: toast messages

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is authenticated and has files shared with them.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dashboard/shared 2. Observe shared files listing 3. Click on a shared folder to navigate into it 4. Use breadcrumb to navigate back 5. Click download on a non-folder shared file
New/Expected Behaviour: Shared files load with sharedBy info visible. Folder navigation works with breadcrumb. Download opens file in new tab. Empty state shown if no shared files.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard/shared; Assert: shared files displayed; Assert: folder navigation works

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is authenticated with files across accounts.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dashboard/stats 2. Observe charts (pie chart for file types, bar chart for storage, area chart for activity) 3. Verify data matches the overview page stats
New/Expected Behaviour: Charts render with correct data. Storage breakdown matches connected accounts. File type distribution matches actual files. No chart rendering errors or empty charts when data exists.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard/stats; Assert: Recharts components render; Assert: data matches overview

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is authenticated and on /dashboard/settings.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dashboard/settings 2. Verify current Client ID is displayed (masked or partial) 3. Click Edit on Client ID 4. Change to a new valid Client ID and save 5. Verify localStorage updates
New/Expected Behaviour: Current Client ID shown. Edit mode reveals input. After saving, localStorage cn_clientId updates to new value. Success feedback shown.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard/settings; Assert: cn_clientId in localStorage matches new value

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is authenticated with 1+ connected accounts on /dashboard/settings.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /dashboard/settings 2. Observe connected accounts list with storage quotas 3. Click Disconnect on an account 4. Verify account is removed from the list and localStorage 5. Click Connect Account to add a new one
New/Expected Behaviour: Accounts shown with email and storage bar. Disconnect removes the account from UI and cn_accounts in localStorage. Connect opens OAuth flow.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard/settings; Assert: account count changes after disconnect

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is on any page with the theme toggle visible.
Test Steps: 1. Click the theme toggle button (sun/moon icon) in Navbar 2. Verify theme switches between dark and light 3. Refresh the page 4. Verify theme persists
New/Expected Behaviour: Theme switches visually (background, text, border colors change). The cn_theme key in localStorage updates to 'dark' or 'light'. After refresh, the persisted theme is applied. No flash of wrong theme on load.
Automation Notes: Selectors: theme toggle button; Assert: document.documentElement.classList contains 'light' after toggle; Assert: localStorage.getItem('cn_theme') matches

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is not authenticated.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to / (landing page) 2. Verify CloudNest branding throughout 3. Check all CTA buttons (Get Started, GitHub, Star on GitHub) 4. Verify footer credits (Built by Ankur, portfolio link, inspiration credit) 5. Verify hero stats bar
New/Expected Behaviour: All text says CloudNest (consistent CloudNest branding). Get Started links to /setup. GitHub links to https://github.com/Encryptioner/CloudNest. Footer has portfolio link to encryptioner.github.io and inspiration credit. Stats bar shows '100% Browser-Based' or similar.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/; Assert: all text shows 'CloudNest' branding; Assert: GitHub links correct; Assert: footer credit present

Pre-existing Behaviour: User navigates to /docs.
Test Steps: 1. Open /docs 2. Verify all 6 sections render (Getting Started, Setup Guide, Using CloudNest, How It Works, FAQ, Troubleshooting) 3. Click sidebar navigation links 4. Verify "Open Dashboard" buttons link to /dashboard (not /login) 5. Verify GitHub and portfolio links
New/Expected Behaviour: All sections render with correct content. Sidebar nav scrolls to correct sections. Open Dashboard buttons navigate to /dashboard. No broken links. No other references.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/docs; Assert: no href containing '/login'; Assert: all section headings visible

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is on any dashboard page.
Test Steps: 1. Observe sidebar on desktop (>1024px) 2. Click each nav item (Overview, Files, Shared, Trash, Accounts, Stats, Settings) 3. Verify active state highlights current page 4. On mobile (<1024px), verify sidebar is hidden by default 5. Click hamburger menu to open sidebar 6. Click a nav item to navigate (sidebar should close on mobile)
New/Expected Behaviour: Sidebar shows all nav items with icons. Active page is highlighted. Storage summary at bottom shows used/total. On mobile, sidebar opens as overlay and closes after navigation.
Automation Notes: Selectors: sidebar nav items, hamburger button; Assert: active class on current route

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is on the dashboard performing any async operation.
Test Steps: 1. Upload a file and observe loading toast 2. Wait for success toast after upload completes 3. Trigger an error (e.g., upload with expired token) and observe error toast 4. Verify toasts auto-dismiss after timeout
New/Expected Behaviour: Loading toast appears during async operation. Success toast shows on completion. Error toast shows on failure with descriptive message. Toasts stack if multiple. Auto-dismiss after ~4 seconds.
Automation Notes: Assert: toast container visible during operations; Assert: toast disappears after timeout

Pre-existing Behaviour: User is authenticated but token will expire within 5 minutes.
Test Steps: 1. Manually set tokenExpiry in cn_accounts to Date.now() - 1000 (expired) 2. Try to perform a Drive operation (list files, upload, etc.) 3. Observe the re-auth behavior
New/Expected Behaviour: App attempts silent re-authentication via GIS requestAccessToken with prompt: ''. If silent fails, user sees toast notification. Operations do not crash or show cryptic errors.
Automation Notes: Assert: no unhandled error thrown; Assert: either silent re-auth succeeds or user gets clear feedback

Pre-existing Behaviour: User has 2+ connected accounts with different free space amounts.
Test Steps: 1. Connect two Google accounts with different storage usage 2. Upload a file 3. Check which account received the file (observe in Google Drive directly)
New/Expected Behaviour: File is uploaded to the account with the MOST free storage space (smart routing). If account A has 10GB free and account B has 5GB free, the file goes to account A.
Automation Notes: Assert: file uploaded to account with highest storageQuota.free value

Feature/Update Name: SPA routing on GitHub Pages (404 redirect)
Pre-existing Behaviour: App is deployed to GitHub Pages.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate directly to https://encryptioner.github.io/CloudNest/dashboard 2. Observe if the page loads 3. Navigate directly to https://encryptioner.github.io/CloudNest/docs 4. Navigate to a non-existent route like /CloudNest/nonexistent
New/Expected Behaviour: Direct navigation to valid routes loads the correct page (via 404.html redirect trick). Non-existent routes load the app root which handles routing. No 404 error page from GitHub Pages.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/dashboard (direct navigation); Assert: app loads, not GitHub 404 page

Pre-existing Behaviour: User accesses the app on a mobile device (375px width).
Test Steps: 1. Open the app at 375px viewport width 2. Navigate through landing page, setup wizard, and dashboard 3. Verify no horizontal overflow 4. Verify touch targets are at least 44px 5. Verify text is readable without zooming
New/Expected Behaviour: No horizontal scrollbar. Setup wizard steps fit on mobile with scroll. Dashboard sidebar is hidden behind hamburger. File grid adapts to 2 columns. All buttons/links are tappable. Text is >=14px or readable at default zoom.
Automation Notes: Viewport: 375x812; Assert: no overflow-x; Assert: sidebar hidden; Assert: grid cols=2

Pre-existing Behaviour: User accesses the app on a desktop (1920px width).
Test Steps: 1. Open the app at 1920px viewport width 2. Navigate through all dashboard pages 3. Verify sidebar is permanently visible 4. Verify file grid uses maximum columns 5. Verify content doesn't stretch excessively
New/Expected Behaviour: Sidebar always visible. File grid uses 6 columns on XL screens. Content is max-width constrained. Charts and tables fill available space appropriately.
Automation Notes: Viewport: 1920x1080; Assert: sidebar visible; Assert: grid cols>=5

Pre-existing Behaviour: User relies on keyboard for navigation.
Test Steps: 1. Tab through the landing page — verify all interactive elements receive focus 2. Tab through the setup wizard — verify input fields and buttons are focusable 3. Tab through the dashboard — verify nav items, file actions, and buttons are reachable 4. Press Enter on focused elements to activate them
New/Expected Behaviour: All interactive elements (links, buttons, inputs) are reachable via Tab. Focus indicators are visible. Enter/Space activates buttons. No keyboard traps. Skip-to-content or logical tab order.
Automation Notes: Assert: all buttons and links focusable; Assert: focus ring visible; Assert: no keyboard trap

Pre-existing Behaviour: App is deployed and publicly accessible.
Test Steps: 1. View page source of the landing page 2. Verify <title> contains CloudNest 3. Verify <meta name="description"> is present and descriptive 4. Verify og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url are present 5. Check robots.txt is accessible and allows crawling 6. Check sitemap.xml lists public routes
New/Expected Behaviour: Title: 'CloudNest - Unified Google Drive Dashboard'. All OG tags present with CloudNest branding. og:image points to /og-image.svg. robots.txt allows all. sitemap.xml includes /, /docs, /setup. No dashboard routes in sitemap.
Automation Notes: URL: /CloudNest/; Assert: meta tags present; URL: /CloudNest/robots.txt; Assert: Allow: /; URL: /CloudNest/sitemap.xml; Assert: contains /docs
